intro: Medranoa johnstonii, also known as 'Tinomana', is a plant species endemic to New Zealand and a member of the family Aizoaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the relief of conditions like arthritis and skin irritations.
